ideation: This sequence depicts a robot enthusiastically starting a new task. The animation begins with arms at the sides, transitioning to a raised-arm posture, followed by a slight bow and finally returning to the relaxed state. Frame 1 shows a neutral pose, establishing a baseline. Frame 2 depicts both arms raised slightly, palms facing forward, to show eagerness. Frame 3 shows a slight bow, with both arms moving forward and slightly downward. Frame 4 returns to the neutral pose, completing the gesture.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to begin
arms lift slightly, eager to start the task
a slight bow forward, showing commitment
arms return to rest, task accepted
